title: A SANGNA LAM KA KAH TO HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A sangna lam ka kahto hi
Nisim a thak ka tung zo hi
Kahto kawm kong thum lai Topa
"Hong suanto in a sangzaw ah"

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa aw hong domto in la
Ka muh ngei nai loh van zaangah
Upna tawh hong dingto sak in
A sangzaw ah hong suan to in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungmanna launa tamna ah
Midangte a ut hang in ah
Kei ka lungsim a ut kei hi
Kei' tupna a sang zaw na hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A sangzaw a misiangte' la
Upna tawh kei mah in ka za
Dawi mangpa'n thal in hong kap hang
Ka sangzaw nuam hi leitung sang

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A sangpen dong ka kah nuam hi
Vangliatna taang ka mu nuam hi
Vantung ka muh dong Topa aw
A sangzaw ah hong pito aw
